title: botrychium lanuginosum
intro: Botrychium lanuginosum, also known as woolly grape fern, is a type of rare and perennial fern native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Botrychium lanuginosum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and stems, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
